overview: Uday is a Flipkart-style e-commerce app with a blue and silver color scheme. Customers can browse products by category, filter by price, manage a shopping cart, and place orders via Cash on Delivery. An owner-only admin panel allows full product and order management.
features: Homepage with hero banner, featured products, and category showcase
Product listing with category and price range filters
Product detail page with image gallery and add-to-cart
Shopping cart with quantity management and localStorage persistence
Checkout with COD (active) and PhonePe/GPay/Paytm (Coming Soon)
Order confirmation with order tracking details
Admin panel with product add/edit/delete and order status management
Sample catalog with 15+ products across Electronics, Fashion, Home, Beauty, Sports
Blue (#1a73e8) and silver color scheme throughout
